emails.subject: PG&E Meeting 1/10/01
emails.body: FYI The meeting with the senior executive team was cancelled for today. I will let you know when it gets rescheduled and hopefully you will be available. Wanda Forwarded by Wanda Curry/HOU/EES on 01/09/2001 03:50 PM Mercy Gil@ENRON 01/09/2001 02:21 PM
